name: three-kingdoms-kill
description: A playable, bilingual (中文 / English) browser version of 三国杀 for friends. Online multiplayer, Standard edition first.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.dev:client: npm run build -w shared && npm run dev -w client
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w shared && npm run dev -w server
scripts.test: npm run build -w shared && npm test -w server && npm test -w client
scripts.test:server: npm run build -w shared && npm test -w server
scripts.test:client: npm run build -w shared && npm test -w client
